objective: Stratégie trend-following BTC avec Bollinger + RSI

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy aims to capture trends in BTC by using Bollinger Bands for volatility assessment and RSI for overbought/oversold conditions. It will enter long when the price closes above the lower Bollinger Band and RSI is below a certain level, indicating potential upward momentum.
